briefing_zh:
本周 AI 研究的最大亮点是 **SU-01** 模型（上海 AI Lab），一个仅 30B（A3B 激活）的模型通过三阶段训练流水线，在 IPhO 2024/2025 和 IMO/USAMO 2025/2026 上超越金牌门槛，展示了小模型在科学推理上的惊人潜力。与此同时，视频生成领域迎来两项突破：NVIDIA 的 **SANA-WM** 用 2.6B 参数实现一分钟 720p 6-DoF 视频生成，**Causal Forcing++** 则将交互式视频推向实时，首帧延迟降低 50%。

Agent 研究持续升温。**SDAR**（浙大/美团/清华）提出自蒸馏式 Agentic RL，在 ALFWorld 上成功率提升 9.4%。**LIFE Framework** 首次统一了个体能力、多 Agent 协作、失败归因和自进化四个维度。GitHub 上 **harmonist-orchestral** 多 Agent 编排引擎一周获 421 星，**TradingAgents-astock** 将多 Agent 辩论机制引入 A 股投研。

记忆与评测成为新焦点。**δ-mem** 为冻结 LLM 添加在线记忆层，**MemLens** 和 **MemEye** 分别从多模态和视觉中心角度构建 Agent 长期记忆基准测试，填补了该领域评测空白。HN 上 **Statewright** 用可视化状态机提升 Agent 可靠性，获 126 points，反映业界对 Agent 可控性的强烈需求。
briefing_en:
The week's headline is **SU-01** (Shanghai AI Lab), a 30B (A3B active) model that clears gold-medal thresholds on IPhO 2024/2025 and IMO/USAMO 2025/2026 through a simple three-stage training pipeline—showing that olympiad-level scientific reasoning no longer requires frontier-scale models. In video generation, NVIDIA's **SANA-WM** delivers 1-minute 720p video with 6-DoF camera control from just 2.6B parameters, while **Causal Forcing++** halves first-frame latency for real-time interactive video.

Agent research is intensifying. **SDAR** (Zhejiang/Meituan/Tsinghua) introduces self-distilled agentic RL with a +9.4% success rate gain on ALFWorld. The **LIFE Framework** unifies individual capability, multi-agent collaboration, failure attribution, and self-evolution. On GitHub, **harmonist-orchestral** (421 stars in a week) and **TradingAgents-astock** (A-share multi-agent debate framework, 314 stars) reflect surging demand for agent orchestration.

Memory and evaluation are emerging as critical sub-fields. **δ-mem** adds online memory to frozen LLM backbones (+4.87pp). **MemLens** and **MemEye** each tackle multimodal agent long-term memory benchmarking from different angles. On HN, **Statewright** (126 points) uses visual state machines to make agents reliable—signaling the industry's hunger for controllable agent behavior.
viral_analysis_zh: **SU-01** 最可能出圈——「30B 小模型拿奥赛金牌」的叙事极具传播力，直接挑战「大力出奇迹」的范式。其次是 **SANA-WM**，NVIDIA 出品 + 一分钟 720p 视频 + 低成本的组合适合 demo 驱动传播。Agent 记忆赛道的 MemLens/MemEye 双 benchmark 同期发布也值得关注，可能引发记忆方向的集中讨论。
viral_analysis_en: **SU-01** has the strongest viral potential—'30B model wins olympiad gold medals' is a compelling narrative that directly challenges the scaling-is-everything paradigm. Runner-up is **SANA-WM**: NVIDIA brand + 1-minute 720p video + low cost is perfect for demo-driven sharing. The simultaneous release of MemLens and MemEye as dual memory benchmarks could also spark concentrated discussion around agent memory.

huggingface_papers.title: Achieving Gold-Medal-Level Olympiad Reasoning via Simple and Unified Scaling
huggingface_papers.tldr: SU-01 (30B, A3B active) achieves gold-medal scores on IPhO 2024/2025 and IMO/USAMO 2025/2026 via a three-stage pipeline: supervised pre-training on curated STEM data, reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards, and test-time compute scaling. Demonstrates that olympiad-level reasoning doesn't require frontier-scale models.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: SU-01（30B，A3B 激活）通过三阶段流水线在 IPhO 和 IMO/USAMO 上达到金牌水平，证明奥赛级推理不需要前沿规模模型。

huggingface_papers.title: Causal Forcing++: Scalable Few-Step Autoregressive Diffusion Distillation for Real-Time Interactive Video Generation
huggingface_papers.tldr: Extends Causal Forcing to real-time interactive video with 1-2 sampling steps, achieving 50% lower first-frame latency and ~1.4x throughput. Enables responsive streaming video generation where user input affects output in real time.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: 将 Causal Forcing 扩展到实时交互式视频生成，仅需 1-2 步采样，首帧延迟降低 50%，吞吐提升约 1.4 倍。

huggingface_papers.title: Self-Distilled Agentic Reinforcement Learning
huggingface_papers.tldr: SDAR combines on-policy self-distillation with token-level gating for agentic RL, achieving +9.4% success rate on ALFWorld. The self-distillation mechanism stabilizes training by using the agent's own improving policy as teacher.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: SDAR 将 on-policy 自蒸馏与 token 级门控结合用于 Agentic RL，在 ALFWorld 上成功率提升 9.4%。

huggingface_papers.title: MemLens: Benchmarking Multimodal Long-Term Memory in Large Vision-Language Models
huggingface_papers.tldr: First comprehensive benchmark for evaluating multimodal long-term memory in vision-language models. Tests retention, retrieval, and reasoning over extended interactions, revealing significant gaps in current models' memory capabilities.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: 首个全面评估视觉语言模型多模态长期记忆的基准测试，揭示当前模型记忆能力的显著不足。

huggingface_papers.title: SANA-WM: Efficient Minute-Scale World Modeling with Hybrid Linear Diffusion Transformer
huggingface_papers.tldr: NVIDIA's 2.6B-parameter world model generates 1-minute 720p video with 6-DoF camera control using hybrid linear diffusion transformers. Matches larger industrial baselines at significantly lower compute cost.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: NVIDIA 的 2.6B 参数世界模型生成一分钟 720p 视频，支持 6-DoF 摄像机控制，以更低成本匹配大型工业模型质量。

alphaxiv_papers.title: δ-mem: Online Memory for Frozen LLM Backbones
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: Adds fixed-size associative memory with low-rank attention corrections to frozen LLMs, enabling online memory without retraining. +4.87pp on Qwen3-4B-Instruct memory benchmarks.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: 为冻结 LLM 添加固定大小关联记忆和低秩注意力修正，无需重训即可实现在线记忆，在 Qwen3-4B-Instruct 记忆基准上提升 4.87pp。

alphaxiv_papers.title: LIFE Framework: Unifying Collaboration, Failure Attribution, and Self-Evolution in LLM-based MAS
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: First unified framework covering four pillars of multi-agent systems: individual capability, collaboration, failure attribution, and self-evolution. Provides systematic taxonomy for robust LLM-based MAS.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: 首个统一覆盖多 Agent 系统四大支柱的框架：个体能力、协作、失败归因和自进化。

alphaxiv_papers.title: VGGT-Ω: Feed-Forward 3D Reconstruction with Power-Law Scaling
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: Scales feed-forward 3D reconstruction with 70% GPU memory reduction and 20-25% faster inference, handling both static and dynamic scenes.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: 以幂律扩展前馈 3D 重建，GPU 显存减少 70%，推理加速 20-25%，支持静态和动态场景。

alphaxiv_papers.title: SANA-WM: Efficient Minute-Scale World Modeling (NVIDIA)
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: 2.6B-param world model generating 1-minute 720p video with 6-DoF camera control at lower cost than industrial baselines.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: 2.6B 参数世界模型，生成一分钟 720p 视频，支持 6-DoF 摄像机控制，成本低于工业基线。

alphaxiv_papers.title: SU-01: Gold-Medal Olympiad Reasoning (Shanghai AI Lab)
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: 30B-A3B model exceeds gold medal thresholds on IPhO 2024/2025 and IMO/USAMO 2025/2026 through a three-stage training pipeline.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: 30B-A3B 模型通过三阶段训练在 IPhO 和 IMO/USAMO 上超越金牌门槛。

github_repos.name: 2508965-ship-it/harmonist-orchestral
github_repos.tldr: Multi-agent orchestration engine for building and deploying AI agent swarms with workflow definitions and inter-agent communication.
github_repos.tldr_zh: 多 Agent 编排引擎，支持工作流定义和 Agent 间通信，首周 421 星。

github_repos.name: simonlin1212/TradingAgents-astock
github_repos.tldr: A-share multi-agent research framework with 7 analyst agents debating on dragon-tiger lists, hot money flows, and lockup data.
github_repos.tldr_zh: A 股多 Agent 投研框架，7 位分析师基于龙虎榜、游资、解禁数据辩论决策。

github_repos.name: agentic-in/elephant-agent
github_repos.tldr: Personal-model-first self-evolving AI agent emphasizing local adaptation and user data sovereignty over cloud dependence.
github_repos.tldr_zh: 个人模型优先的自进化 AI Agent，强调本地适配和数据主权。

github_repos.name: Callous-0923/agent-study
github_repos.tldr: 36-chapter AI Agent full-stack course: ReAct, Claude Code internals, MCP/A2A, RAG, DSPy, production deployment.
github_repos.tldr_zh: 36 章 AI Agent 全栈课程：ReAct、Claude Code 逆向、MCP/A2A、RAG、DSPy、生产部署。

github_repos.name: yaassin12/DeepSeek-V4-Pro-App
github_repos.tldr: Desktop app for DeepSeek V4 Pro (1.6T MoE). Native UI for local model interaction, 604 stars in a week.
github_repos.tldr_zh: DeepSeek V4 Pro 桌面应用（1.6T MoE），提供本地模型原生交互界面，首周 604 星。

hackernews.title: Show HN: Statewright – Visual state machines that make AI agents reliable
hackernews.tldr: Uses visual state machines to constrain AI agent behavior through explicit state graphs, making agents deterministic and debuggable.
hackernews.tldr_zh: 用可视化状态机通过显式状态图约束 AI Agent 行为，使 Agent 确定性和可调试。

hackernews.title: Show HN: Agentic interface for mainframes and COBOL
hackernews.tldr: AI agent interface for legacy mainframe and COBOL systems, enabling natural language interaction with decades-old enterprise infrastructure.
hackernews.tldr_zh: 面向传统大型机和 COBOL 系统的 AI Agent 接口，实现与数十年历史企业基础设施的自然语言交互。

hackernews.title: Launch HN: Ardent (YC P26) – Postgres sandboxes in seconds with zero migration
hackernews.tldr: Instant Postgres sandbox environments with zero migration. Useful for AI agent testing requiring database state isolation.
hackernews.tldr_zh: 零迁移即时 Postgres 沙箱环境，对需要数据库状态隔离的 AI Agent 测试尤为实用。

hackernews.title: Launch HN: Voker (YC S24) – Analytics for AI Agents
hackernews.tldr: YC-backed observability platform for AI agents with behavior analytics, performance metrics, and debugging tools.
hackernews.tldr_zh: YC 投资的 AI Agent 可观测性平台，提供行为分析、性能指标和调试工具。

hackernews.title: Show HN: E2a – Open-source email gateway for AI agents
hackernews.tldr: Open-source email gateway enabling AI agents to send/receive emails programmatically, filling a practical integration gap.
hackernews.tldr_zh: 开源邮件网关，让 AI Agent 程序化收发邮件，填补实际集成空白。
